title: Plot Armor Paper
description: This plugin for paper 1.21+ adds plot armor.
body:
# Plot Armor?
This mod adds multiple commands:
_Add People:_ /plotarmor add {player}
_Remove People:_ /plotarmor remove {player}
_Toggle the plugin on and off:_ /plotarmor toggle

It is perfect for Scripted SMP's or Minecraft videos.
- It makes you immortal, but sneakily. It doesn't make it obvious you have plot armor.

## Immune?
It protects you from:
- Fall Damage
- Magic
- Mobs
- The Void
- /kill
- /damage
- TNT
- Fire
- Players
- Once you are low on health, it gives you a slight speed boost. Not the effect, but your max speed gets increased so your viewers will not notice.

### Configurable?
Version 1 of the mod is decently customisable.
In future versions there will be way more customisability.

```
This is the minimum health reachable. 1 is half a heart. 2 is one full heart. 
min-health: 1.0

if this is set to true, you will get resistance and speed when getting saved from death.
escape-boost: true

If this is set to true, you will heal a bit quicker than normal
silent-heal: true

DO NOT TOUCH. UNLESS YOU WANT TO REMOVE EVERYONE. DO NOT CHANGE WITH SERVER ACTIVE. (Only commands in the server itself while it is active.)
protected-players:
- {UID of a player}

```
